<blockquote>Increases the [[Basic Core Stats|Nourishment Points]] your Dog gets from food items by '''10%''' per level. 

In addition, from '''level 2,''' your Dog will be less of a picky eater and accept [https://minecraft.wiki/w/Cooked_Fish Cooked Fishes] on their own.</blockquote>

== Trivia ==
[[File:Happy Eater talent old.gif|thumb|No longer be able to eat Rotten Flesh]]
*It was added in the original DT.
* Back then, DTN Dogs can eat Rotten Flesh, but later the Dev's decided that they deserved better quality food.
